mapper.select: select s.cod_departamento as code, s.descripcion as description from ba_departamentos s
select s.cod_ciudad as code, s.descripcion as description from ba_ciudades s where s.cod_pais = 586 and s.cod_departamento = #{provinceId}
select s.cod_barrio as code, s.descripcion as description from ba_barrios s where s.cod_pais = 586 and s.cod_ciudad = #{cityId}

{CALL PAW_HBK.fu_reg_mensajes( #{notification.documentNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.notificationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.phoneNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.emailSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{notification.personKind,jdbcType=VARCHAR,mode=IN}, #{message.codMensaje, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER, resultMap=messageMapping}, #{message.mensaje, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, resultMap=messageMapping}, #{message.tipMensaje, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, resultMap=messageMapping} )}
